scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:ui && pnpm run lint:rust
scripts.format: pnpm run format:ui && pnpm run format:rust
scripts.format:check: pnpm run format:ui:check && pnpm run format:rust:check
scripts.test: node scripts/build-ui.mjs && node scripts/build-ui-tests.mjs && node scripts/run-ui-tests.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:rust
